title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Mayor, Honorable Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) for and in Behalf of the Local Government Unit of Los Baños with the Department of Science and Technology ? Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (DOST-PHIVOLCS) for the Installation of Intensity Meters in the Municipality and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. ( AUTHOR : HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 08/24/2020)
